---
title: "test_jit_injection.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_jit_injection.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.97
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 3.90
overall_score: 3.12
---

## Intent
The `test_jit_injection.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_jit_loading. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_jit_loading. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `test_jit_loading`
